special_mechanics.name: Aircraft Selection
special_mechanics.description: Three selectable pilots (Shin Kazama, Mickey Simon, Greg Gates) each with specific aircraft in arcade version. SNES version allows all pilots to use multiple aircraft including F8 Crusader.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Shop System
special_mechanics.description: Players earn money by destroying enemies and can purchase special weapons and defenses before levels. Unused weapons convert back to money.

special_mechanics.name: Energy Bar System
special_mechanics.description: Player has energy bar consumed by sustained damage rather than reserve lives system. Uncommon for arcade-style shooters of this era.

tier_notes: T2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources (Wikipedia, TCRF) contain no specific physics values, sub-pixel data, or movement parameters. Game is a horizontal scrolling shooter (shmup), not a platformer, so traditional jump/gravity mechanics do not apply.
